phase3_findings.description: The changeset describes three DEFERRED features as shipped: the tier-2/tier-3 selection ladder, binding-required-on-file-arm strict enforcement, and the divergent-roots out-of-bounds enumerations. All three false against HEAD; the token binding-required-on-file-arm exists only inside the deferral comment. This prose is prepended verbatim into CHANGELOG.md.

The --write-path argparse help says 'Required on the file arm'; the flag has no required=True and no presence check, and this PR's own row asserts the omitted case exits 0. Verified on the RENDERED --help surface per the #375 wrapped-literal rule.
`and args.write_path` is a truthiness test, so --write-path "" silently disarms the cross-check (probed live: rc 0). An empty value is an unestablished report, not an opt-out.

The record-draft-binding fence reads $MAIN_ROOT assigned in a DIFFERENT bash fence. Each fence is a separate shell invocation, so it expands empty and the bind fails closed (binding-path-not-absolute) on every runner — defeating the feature. CLAUDE.md #275.
Sub-step 3 display rationale sourced the path from $MAIN_ROOT context recall; becomes false when tier-2 lands.

record-dispatch digests the caller's --draft-file, which it does not resolve from the binding, unlike emit-body/query-eligibility/query-summary. A correct --write-path with a drifted --draft-file is still recorded.

fix_decisions.claim_text: record-dispatch should read --draft-file through the binding
fix_decisions.evidence: this is the bound-first reader reconciliation the PR's Phase-2.2.5 scope split explicitly defers; the overstating comment/changeset/§11 prose was corrected instead

parking_evidence.basis: the deferral is a recorded, documented scope split predating this review; the review corrected the prose that overstated the guard rather than expanding scope
parking_evidence.failing_input: a caller reporting a correct --write-path while passing a drifted --draft-file
parking_evidence.source: scripts/issue-audit-state.py NOTE (issue #569 scope split); workpad Acceptance Criteria deferred list
